title: Work Unit (SPMC)
description: Framework §5. The smallest reproducible unit of realisation: one bounded transformation, frozen input, one artifact. The four SPMC parts plus the references and the trace it must emit.

schema.description: S of SPMC: the shape of the artifact this unit produces (a path to / inline description of the output schema).

prompt.description: P of SPMC: the single-purpose instruction. One prompt, one artifact.

model.description: M of SPMC: the model binding. Small where possible; a unit needing a frontier model signals upstream under-specification.

context.description: C of SPMC: the frozen, declared input. Same input must yield the same output (the reproducibility guarantee).

derived_from.description: Pointers to the What concepts / How conventions / upstream units this input is drawn from.

frozen.description: Must be true. The context is frozen at dispatch; reproducibility depends on it.

hash.description: Optional content hash of the assembled context, for provenance.

artifact.description: The single artifact produced (one unit, one artifact).

path.description: The exact repository path the artifact lands at — authoritative. The harness writes the worker's content here and ignores any path the worker emits. Concrete: the cell's templated path resolved against the dispatch bindings.

applies.description: Principles/patterns this unit applies, by pointer (never re-declared). Each must be enforced by a passing verification for its trace claim to survive.

trace.description: The rationale trace this unit's output carries. Generated from the pointers; claims gated by verifications.

structure.description: The top decision that shapes its placement.
